# Product Listings Master File
# Auto-generated by Phase 2 — do not edit manually
# Parsed by scripts/meta_generator.py to build listing.json per product
#
# Format per product:
#   1. Product Name ($price)
#   **Title**: ...
#   **Tags**: tag1, tag2, ...
#   **Full Description**: ...
#   ---
#
# Run: ./run.sh phase2        to regenerate this file from brand_guide.md
# Run: ./run.sh meta <name>   to extract one product's meta.json
